name: Capital on Tap - US
description_short: Capital on Tap - US is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 4.4/5 with 565 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Capital on Tap - US is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. With 565 Google reviews and a 4.4/5.0 rating, Capital on Tap - US has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Capital on Tap - US specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Capital on Tap - US operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Capital on Tap - US should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
